# Paywall Upgrade CRO

## Overview
Conversion rate optimization (CRO) specifically for paywalls, upgrade prompts, freemium conversion flows, and subscription pricing pages.

## Conversion Principles

### Paywall Design
- Show value before the ask (preview what they get)
- Social proof (X users upgraded, Y companies trust us)
- Clear tier comparison (Free vs Pro vs Enterprise)
- Annual discount (monthly × 10 or 12 for annual)
- Money-back guarantee reduces risk

### Timing
- After user hits a usage limit
- After they experience a key "aha moment"
- Not on first visit — let them experience value first

### Copy Patterns
- "Unlock" rather than "Buy"
- "Get the most out of X" rather than "Upgrade now"
- Feature teasers: "You've used your 5 free — want unlimited?"
